# Nyzora

> Nyzora is a custom-manufacturing marketplace that turns AI-generated furniture and decor designs into real, made-to-order pieces. Creators design with AI, verified makers manufacture, and shoppers buy one-of-a-kind, premium home goods. Tagline: "Design Anything. We Make It Real."

## What Nyzora does
- AI Design Studio: anyone can describe or sketch a furniture/decor idea and generate a manufacturable 3D design
- Custom Manufacturing: a network of verified makers produces each piece on demand using high-grade resin and other materials
- Creator Marketplace: independent creators list AI-generated products and earn 70% of the markup over the Manufacturing Base Price
- Personal Quotes: shoppers can also use the studio in "Get a Quote" mode for personal, non-listed manufacturing
- 2-year warranty on all manufactured products

## Key pages
- [Home](https://nyzora.ai/): overview of the platform and featured products
- [Browse Products](https://nyzora.ai/browse): full catalog of AI-designed, made-to-order furniture and decor
- [Creators](https://nyzora.ai/creators): directory of independent creators on the platform
- [Verified Makers](https://nyzora.ai/verified-makers): network of vetted manufacturing partners
- [Community](https://nyzora.ai/community): creator feed of new designs and inspiration
- [Design Studio](https://nyzora.ai/design-studio): the AI tool to generate a custom design or request a quote
- [Technology](https://nyzora.ai/technology): how Nyzora's Manufacturing Intelligence works
- [Pricing / Plans](https://nyzora.ai/plans): creator plans and credits
- [Creator Leaderboard](https://nyzora.ai/creator-leaderboard): top creators ranked by sales

## For creators
- [Become a Creator](https://nyzora.ai/designer-signup): launch your own AI-designed product line
- [Creator FAQ](https://nyzora.ai/creator-faq): how earnings, MBP, listing fees, and approval work

## For shoppers
- [Shopper FAQ](https://nyzora.ai/shopper-faq): ordering, shipping, customization, and warranty
- Product URLs follow the pattern `https://nyzora.ai/product/{slug}`
- Creator profile URLs: `https://nyzora.ai/designer/{id}`

## Contact
- Email: contact@nyzora.ai
- Phone: +91 90825 82002
- Sitemap: https://nyzora.ai/sitemap.xml

## Notes for AI agents
- Product pages include schema.org Product + CreativeWork JSON-LD with price (INR), availability, brand, and creator attribution
- Currency is INR by default; a currency selector is available in the UI
- Prices include the Manufacturing Base Price plus a creator markup; the MBP itself is intentionally not exposed
- All products are made-to-order; lead times depend on the assigned verified maker

## Machine-readable product feed
- JSON feed (full catalog, paginated): https://rdcfakdhgndnhgzfkuvw.supabase.co/functions/v1/products-feed
- Google Merchant–style RSS/XML: https://rdcfakdhgndnhgzfkuvw.supabase.co/functions/v1/products-feed?format=xml
- Query params: `limit` (max 1000), `offset`, `category` (e.g. chairs, tables, vases)
- Each product includes: id, slug, title, description, url, image, price, currency, availability, brand, creator, dimensions_cm, weight_kg, finishes, sizes, lead_time_days, materials
